description: After a game, a league official must verify the official statistics before they are published.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the preliminary stats sheet from the on-site scorer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the raw statistical data from the game.

nodes.task_description: Cross-reference the stats with the video of the game to check for any errors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews key plays and finds a scoring error, incorrectly crediting an assist.

nodes.task_description: Correct the error in the official stats sheet.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully corrects the assist credit.

nodes.task_description: Finalize and publish the official game statistics.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locks the stats sheet and publishes it.
